body_template: 120 miles from Thistledown. Silvergate lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
{character} passes the silver gates. The Deepdelve waits {miles_to_next} on.
Into the deep places. Whisperwood lies {miles_to_next} beyond.
Out of the dark and under the leaves. The Windmark stands {miles_to_next} ahead.
Over a thousand miles walked. Whitewatch waits {miles_to_next} on.
The last watch before the spire. Ember Spire burns {miles_to_next} beyond.
{character} stands at the spire — {total_miles} walked from Thistledown.
